Seed Launch Strategies
Module 6
The Seed Launch is a powerful strategy…
• It revolves around having a conversation with
your list
• It enables you to create a great product
• The best way to create a great business is to have
a great product
• It’s super powerful
The Seed Launch is a great place to start…
• No list, no product?
• This is the easiest way to create a product
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
The Seed Launch
• You sell your program before you create it
• You pay for your college classes before you
take them
• You pay for a play or a movie before you see it
• You pay for a magazine before it’s created
• This is how most products work in the real
world
The Seed Launch
• You create it live with a small group
• You deliver your content during live calls (usually
five calls)
• Send a survey between each call to identify what
to teach in the next call
• Record the calls, have them transcribed, and
package your training into a digital product or
program to sell
It’s a very interactive process…
• Get feedback based on the surveys and
conversation on and between each call
• Build a great product with audience input
• Makes it easy to build relationships
• People tend to get good results
• Gives you great case studies
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Why the Seed Launch is great when you’re
starting out…
• Learn how to teach
• Most people know their product but may not be
great at teaching
• Avoid the curse of knowledge
• It’s almost impossible to remember what it’s like to
be a beginner
• You’re mostly going to be selling to beginners
• Everyone starts as beginners
• Using the Seed Launch you get to interact with
beginners
Why the Seed Launch is great when you’re
starting out…
• Find out what your avatar really wants to know
(rather than guessing)
• Prevents procrastination
• You sell the product and then you have to deliver
it
Why the Seed Launch is great…
• Not just for beginners…
• Easiest way to create your next product
• Identifies where the gaps are (when building or
testing your program)
• Helps you understand what you need to revisit or
teach better
• Ultimately helps you create a great product
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
To Recap… here’s when to use a Seed Launch
• You don’t have an email list
• You don’t have a product
• You’re just starting out and you’re a beginner
• You have an idea for a product but aren’t sure it it
will work
• You don’t have experience teaching and need
feedback
• You want to get some great testimonials and case
studies
When to use a Seed Launch
• You have a business and you’ve got an idea for a
product that you’ve been procrastinating on
getting done
• You have a business and you want to make sure
your new product is a success
• You want to get leverage on creating your
product and get paid in advance for it
When to use a Seed Launch
• You want to do a simple, easy launch
• You want to make sure your customers actually
want your product
• You want to gauge demand for your new idea
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
